title: carum ammi
intro: Carum ammi, also known as ajwain or bishop's weed, is a small, annual plant that belongs to the carrot family. It has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Carum ammi include relief from digestive issues, such as bloating and gas, as well as relief from respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. Carum ammi can be prepared into herbal remedies like teas, infusions, and oils, which can be consumed or applied topically to reap its benefits.
